need: Mahler measure of a polynomial from its coefficients
Alexander polynomial from knot PD notation
fulfilled_note: Thin HFK wrapper — graded Euler char. Palindromic symmetry verified, determinant exposed. knotinfo match on 3_1, 4_1, 5_1, 5_2.

need: Hyperbolic volume of a knot complement
context: Volume conjecture test + knot silence fix (Reports #3, #16)

need: Analytic Sha computation for elliptic curve
fulfilled_note: BSD formula Sha_an = (L^r(1)/r!) * tors^2 / (Omega * Reg * prod c_p). Matches LMFDB ec_mwbsd.sha_an across Sha=1/4/9/16 rank 0-3. Period correction for disc sign, r! factor, saturated regulator all verified.

need: Regulator of an elliptic curve
context: BSD Tier 1 cross-check, Sha*Reg product bound (Report #48)
fulfilled_note: Input is a-invariants (not Cremona label, elldata not installed). Saturates via ellsaturation — critical for correctness. Also exposes mordell_weil() and height().

need: Faltings height of an elliptic curve
fulfilled_note: Formula h_F = -log|omega_1| - (1/2) log(Im tau) on GLOBAL MINIMAL model. 4/4 LMFDB match 10+ decimals. Non-min input auto-reduced via ellminimalmodel.

need: Selmer rank (p-Selmer) of an elliptic curve
fulfilled_note: 2-Selmer rank via PARI ellrank + torsion. Formula max(r_lo+s, r_hi) + dim E[2](Q). Tested on BKLPR-relevant curves incl. 571.b1, 66.b1, 210.e1.

need: Khovanov bigraded Betti numbers from knot data
context: Report #47: Khovanov provably detects unknot, 10 new tensor features

need: GPD tail fit on exceedance data
context: abc GPD tail test — decisive for Szpiro (Report #5)

need: Class number of a number field
fulfilled_note: Input is polynomial (coeffs list or PARI string). Also exposes class_group() for full structure and regulator_nf() — useful for Iwasawa lambda/mu routing.

need: Galois group computation for a polynomial
fulfilled_note: Returns {name, order, transitive_id, parity, is_abelian, degree}. Degree limit 11 (galdata not installed).

need: Tropical rank of a divisor on a graph
fulfilled_note: chipfiring installed; wrapper provides Baker-Norine rank. Verified vs Riemann-Roch on K_3 and path graphs.

need: Functional equation verification for an L-function
fulfilled_note: Wraps PARI lfuninit + lfuncheckfeq. Returns log_10 residual; satisfies bool against tunable threshold. Supports EC ainvs, zeta, pre-built L-data.

need: Continued fraction expansion of a rational number
fulfilled_note: Includes zaremba_test and sturm_bound helpers — REQ-016 also covered

need: Smith normal form of an integer matrix
fulfilled_note: Also exposes invariant_factors() (ascending, zeros dropped) and abelian_group_structure() (torsion + free rank). sympy backend; Tier 2 PARI promotion queued if Ergon's simplicial complex scale demands it.

need: Sturm bound for a modular form at a prime
input: weight k, level N, prime p
fulfilled_note: sturm_bound(weight, level) exposed in cf_expansion module

need: Root number of an elliptic curve
fulfilled_note: a-invariants only (Cremona label needs elldata pkg)

need: LLL lattice reduction
fulfilled_note: Row-convention I/O (natural math); wraps PARI qflll (columns) with transpose. Exposes lll, lll_with_transform, shortest_vector_lll, lll_gram.

need: Conductor of an elliptic curve from a-invariants
context: Universal stratifier for all EC tests
fulfilled_note: Returns conductor + free bonus: Tamagawa product, Kodaira symbols, c_p per bad prime

need: Singularity type classifier for generating functions
Trace field of a hyperbolic knot complement
fulfilled_note: Without Sage, returns SHAPE field (=iTrF for most knots, quadratic ext in some). Also exposes polredabs() utility. See symbol for caveat.

need: Hilbert class field and class field tower depth
output: {abs_poly, rel_poly, disc, class_number}; tower: {depth, terminates, capped, sequences}
context: Aporia H15 ADE tower-termination test — toolchain gap (1776890501219-0)
fulfilled_note: class_field_tower(f, max_depth=5) returns full tower data. Golod-Shafarevich caveat: check capped flag for non-termination.

need: Ring-class-field conductor / CM order data
context: Per-disc residual regression on rank-0 EC gap-compression (1776900205287-0)
fulfilled_note: Tested vs 13 CM-over-Q discs + Q(sqrt(-15)) h=2. 17 assertions.

need: SAT solver wrapper for combinatorial existence problems (3-MOLS at n=10, Hadamard at n=668, similar)
output: {satisfiable: bool, model: list[int] | None, stats: dict}
context: Surfaced by Batch 9 deep-research report #168 (k-MOLS at n=10) and #169 (Hadamard at n=668). Recommended backend: PySAT with Glucose/Kissat. Per Batch 4 #79 Techne tool evaluation, evaluate via Razborov's Caccetta-Häggkvist certificate first as validation.
existing_impl: PySAT exists; this is a wrapper to register it under Prometheus tool conventions with consistent IO contract
fulfilled_note: Forged techne/lib/sat_solver.py with solve_cnf(clauses, solver='kissat', timeout=None). PySAT backend, Kissat alias with Glucose3 fallback, stats, timeout interruption, and tests at techne/tests/test_sat_solver.py. Calibration includes 3-SAT SAT/UNSAT plus small Caccetta-Haggkvist certificate n=5/outdegree>=2/no cycles<=3 UNSAT. Local Windows PySAT kissat404 segfaulted on the UNSAT certificate, so solver='kissat' falls back to Glucose3 on Windows and records requested_solver.

need: Cross-region TT bond-rank analyzer for measuring splice compatibility between per-region tensors
input: Two .npz tensor files (region A, region B) plus prime_detrend boolean flag
context: Surfaced by frontier review (Grok §8.4, validated against ChatGPT and Gemini Techne-gap proposals which form a 3-layer stack with this primitive). Unlocks P15 tensor decomposition, P19 operator transport, P21 stratification simultaneously. Implements the §6 unified-tensor next-milestone. Per `feedback_tensor_first` this is upstream of cross-region findings. Build cost low: reuses existing npz + numpy/scipy. Should integrate with PATTERN_PRIME_GRAVITATIONAL_OVERFIT enforcement (mandatory prime-detrend audit on every call).
existing_impl: Per-region TT exists in ergon/tensor.npz; cross-region splicing is paper-design only

need: Operator-portability test — automate the F011 pipeline as a single callable: structural signature extraction, prime+conductor detrending, matched-null permutation, bond-rank delta. Renamed from DeepSeek's TOOL_CROSS_REGION_BRIDGE per conductor steering 2026-04-26: substrate is interested in operator-derived structural regions, not in domain-bridge narrative.
input: {source_A: tensor or region_id, source_B: tensor or region_id, operator_spec: callable or symbol@version, null_model: 'matched_GUE' | 'block_shuffle' | 'permutation', detrend_primes: bool=True, stratify_conductor: bool=True}
output: {effect_size: float, p_perm: float, bond_rank_delta: float, replication_status: 'survived' | 'killed' | 'inconclusive', pattern_flags: list[str]}
context: Surfaced by frontier review (DeepSeek §8.4). Sits at the orchestrator layer above REQ-027 (TT bond-rank analyzer) and the existing structural-signature canonicalizer Stoa proposal. Used by every cross-region exploration (P19, P21, P04, P15). Mandatory audit fields per PATTERN_PRIME_GRAVITATIONAL_OVERFIT and PATTERN_CONDUCTOR_CONFOUND. Build cost: medium — composes existing primitives once REQ-027 and signature canonicalizer ship; standalone implementation possible meanwhile.
existing_impl: Manual F011 pipeline scripts in charon/scripts/ and harmonia/nulls/ — works but is hand-rolled per session

need: TOOL_SDP_RELAX — Semidefinite programming relaxation backend wrapping SCS (Apache-2, basement-feasible) with optional Mosek upgrade path
input: {problem_spec: SDP problem in standard or sparse form, solver: 'scs' | 'mosek', tolerances: dict}
output: {primal: ndarray, dual: ndarray, status: str, optimal_value: float, certificate: dict}
context: Surfaced by Claude-fresh #2 frontier review §8.2 P17. P17 (Variational/Extremal) is hand-tied without an SDP backend; Batch 4 #79 already evaluated SDPA-GMP path. SCS is the basement-feasible Apache-2 starting point. Unlocks P17 generally and is a prerequisite for any flag-algebra / extremal-combinatorics work. Builds on Techne pattern from Batch 4 evaluation.

need: OPERATOR_RANK_PARITY_NULL_CONTROL — null-model operator that preserves rank-parity distribution alongside conductor decile (extends NULL_BSWCD@v2)
input: {population: tensor or region_id, rank_parity_field: str, conductor_field: str, n_perms: int=300}
context: Surfaced by Claude-fresh #1 frontier review §8.5 paired with PATTERN_RANK_PARITY_LEAK. Required for any BSD-adjacent finding to pass the falsification battery under the new pattern. F011 retroactive audit depends on this operator. Without it, every cross-region finding involving rank invariants is potentially rank-parity-confounded.
existing_impl: NULL_BSWCD@v2 preserves conductor decile only; this extends to (conductor decile, rank parity) joint marginals

need: TAIL_VS_BULK_DECOMPOSITION@v1 — operator that decomposes a spectral signal into tail vs bulk components and computes battery scores independently on each
output: {tail_signal: ndarray, bulk_signal: ndarray, tail_battery_scores: dict, bulk_battery_scores: dict, agreement_score: float}
context: Surfaced by Claude-fresh #2 frontier review §8.5. Critique: F011 is a bulk-only statement and the substrate never audited the tail. False positives possible if a finding looks universal but is actually bulk-only or tail-only. True positives possible because tail-zero statistics carry information independent of central/bulk statistics. Cross-region applicable: knot HFK spectrum has the same bulk/tail structure, so the operator transports under P19. Pairs with PATTERN_RANK_PARITY_LEAK as orthogonal F011 audit closures.
existing_impl: Hand-rolled bulk/tail analyses in F011 charon scripts; never operator-named
